products.name: Stella Maris Testing Solution
products.descriptor: Marine technology testbed with subsea platform, dockside station, and shoreside operations centre

evidence.snippet:
##### Stella Maris Testing Solution
### The ocean is now officially plug-and-play
Introducing COVE’s Stella Maris Testing Solution—the ultimate testbed for marine technology companies. This versatile and cost-effective testing solution includes a subsea platform, dockside testing station, shoreside operations centre, and 24/7 data access, offering everything you need for rapid product development, verification, and commercialization.

**Subsea Platform**
The multi-sensor subsea platform enables long-term testing for product development, verification, and commercialization. Designed for extended deployments, it features integrated instruments connected to the operations center via a plug-and-play device for seamless monitoring.
![](https://coveocean.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/Stella-Maris-Demo-Day1418.png)
**Shoreside Operations Centre**
The Shoreside Operations Centre offers a fully equipped indoor facility for on-site work.
